title: Bets on Post-GPU Compute
summary: Post-GPU compute is a bet that new hardware will make different primitives cheap. When the primitive changes, the winning model classes change. Extropic is a bet that sampling becomes that primitive.

toc.value: On Computing and the Hardware Lottery

structuredData.headline: Bets on Post-GPU Compute

title: PGMs, EBMs, Sampling
summary: Connecting probabilistic graphical models to energy-based formulations, and showing how sampling replaces optimization as the core mechanism for inference and computation.

toc.value: Bayesian Networks and Markov Random Fields

title: Zotero iOS System Design
summary: System design evaluation of the Zotero iOS client based on long-term usage as a knowledge power user tool. Zotero is an open-source reference manager widely used in academic and research workflows.

structuredData.headline: Zotero iOS System Design

title: The Cost of Convenience
summary: I finally deleted my WordPress setup and replaced it with a system I actually control. Markdown, Git, Next.js and Contentlayer now run the show and this stack will survive anything because it is simple, portable and mine.
